<features>
- Small, bright orange/yellow flowers
- Flowers have four distinct petals
- Flowers are clustered on a stem
</features>
<kb>
- IF flowers are small, orange/yellow, and have four petals THEN class 45
- IF flowers are purple with a dark center THEN class 44
- IF flowers are large, pink or white, with many petals and a prominent central seed pod THEN class 77
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image shows small orange flowers with four petals clustered together, which matches the pattern for class 45.
</rule_check>

<response>45</response>

<features>
- Large white petals with pinkish tips
- Prominent yellow, flat-topped, porous center (seed pod)
- Large green leaves in the background
</features>
<kb>
- IF [small orange/yellow flowers with multiple petals] THEN [45]
- IF [purple flowers with dark centers] THEN [44]
- IF [large white/pink petals with a prominent yellow porous center] THEN [77]
</kb>

</rule_check>

<response>77</response>
